scripts.start: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false expo start
scripts.start:lan: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false expo start --lan --go
scripts.start:android:proxy:prod: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 ALL_PROXY=socks5://127.0.0.1:10808 NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1 STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false expo start --tunnel --go --clear --no-dev --minify
scripts.start:tunnel: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false expo start --tunnel --go
scripts.start:tunnel:proxy: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 ALL_PROXY=socks5://127.0.0.1:10808 NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1 STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=false expo start --tunnel --go --clear
scripts.storybook:mobile: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true expo start --clear --port 8084
scripts.storybook:dev-client: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true expo start --dev-client --clear --port 8084
scripts.storybook:lan: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true expo start --lan --clear --port 8084
scripts.storybook:tunnel:direct: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true expo start --tunnel --clear --port 8084
scripts.storybook:tunnel:proxy: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 ALL_PROXY=socks5://127.0.0.1:10808 NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1,::1 STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true expo start --tunnel --clear --port 8084
scripts.storybook:web: npm run storybook:timestamps && cross-env STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true expo start --web --clear --port 8084
